job_description: Build AI applications using Python, machine learning models, APIs, LLMs, vector databases, RAG pipelines, and FastAPI.
Prepare datasets, perform EDA, train machine learning models, evaluate results, and document findings.
Build GenAI assistants using LLM APIs, LangChain, embeddings, vector databases, RAG, structured outputs, and FastAPI.
Create automation tools using Python, APIs, JSON workflows, FastAPI services, and LLM-powered assistants.
Analyze business data, create dashboards, write SQL queries, automate reports using Python, pandas, Excel, and Power BI.
Clean datasets, build classification and regression models, evaluate accuracy and F1-score, and create visual reports.
Develop and deploy machine learning models using Python, Scikit-learn, FastAPI, Docker, and SQL databases.
Build document question-answering systems with chunking, embeddings, ChromaDB, LangChain, RAG evaluation, and FastAPI.
Develop AI support tools, integrate LLM APIs, process JSON responses, create internal dashboards, and improve support workflows.
Clean operational data, perform SQL analysis, prepare Excel reports, build dashboards, and automate recurring reporting tasks.
Assist with machine learning experiments, data preparation, model testing, evaluation, and technical documentation.
Build backend AI services using Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, LLM APIs, JSON schemas, and RAG workflows.
Build automation scripts, process JSON data, work with APIs, create internal tools, and develop FastAPI services.
Analyze AI product data, create dashboards, perform EDA, build simple prediction models, and communicate insights.
Build LLM-powered applications with prompt engineering, structured JSON outputs, RAG retrieval, LangChain, and FastAPI.
Develop responsive user interfaces using React, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git, and GitHub.
Develop Python applications, connect APIs, process JSON data, write SQL queries, and build backend services using FastAPI.
Support AI product prototyping, data analysis, LLM experiments, dashboard development, API testing, and Streamlit demos.
Support machine learning deployment, API packaging, Docker basics, model monitoring, and version control workflows.
Work on text classification, preprocessing, NLP datasets, LLM experiments, and model evaluation.
